Description: The quote denom of the pool.
Available quote balance in the pool (human-readable notional units).
Raw unrealised PnL across all positions in the pool.
Effective unrealised PnL after applying positive uPnL haircut.
Equity used for order admission checks (quote_balance + position_margin + uPnL_eff - fees_buffer).
Equity used for liquidation checks (uses raw uPnL, not haircutted).
Sum of initial margin requirements for existing positions only.
Sum of maintenance margin requirements for existing positions.
Initial margin using worst-case net exposure (q + B, q - S) across all markets.
Sum of entry losses for all open orders.
Sum of fee reserves for all open orders.
Order Lock Requirement = IM_with_orders + entry_loss + fee_reserve. Orders may be cancelled if equity_admission < order_lock_requirement.
The positive uPnL haircut rate applied (e.g., 0.5 = 50%).

Health factor = equity_liquidation / maintenance_margin_total. When < 1, the account is liquidatable. When < 1.5, the account is in a warning state. Empty if maintenance_margin_total is zero (no positions).
